description: Style NoteNow give your casual wear a twist of style with this pair of slippers from red chief. Wear them with your off-duty ensembles.Product DetailsBlack sandals with thick forefoot and midfoot strapsTextured and foamy footbedOutsole stitched to the upper for durabilityTPU outsole with grooves and a pivot point on the toe regionMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
